data.description:
## Why

The project-specific criterion and coaching move are intended to be a concrete client example of the supported extension boundary. Documentation must show the composition accurately without making project moves appear to be packaged built-ins.

## What

Document the rebar portability guard in a separate project-extension subsection, add a structural documentation test, and run the complete repository regression gates after all implementation children land.

## Scope

In scope:

- `docs/plan-review-gate.md`
- `tests/unit/test_project_portability_docs.py`
- final repository lint, typecheck, and test verification

Out of scope:

- changing criterion, move, verifier, or disposition behavior
- documenting the project move inside the parsed built-in move table
- remediating pre-existing portability debt

## Approach

Add a dogfooding example outside the built-in move table. Show the exact project overlay activation, rubric location and four-part finding contract, compatibility dimensions, false-positive boundaries, project move definition, and the separation of responsibilities across Passes 1 through 4. This placement preserves the built-in documentation parser contract while giving clients a complete copyable pattern.

## Dependencies

Depends on the criterion, coaching, and calibration children so the documentation describes the final validated behavior rather than an intermediate design.

## Test Strategy

Use a focused structural documentation test for required examples and placement, then run all repository gates from the fresh worktree.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The guide contains a separate project-extension subsection with the exact `project.portability` routing and activation example. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_docs.py -k routing_example`.
- [ ] The guide explains the four-part finding contract, the four compatibility dimensions, and both false-positive boundaries. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_docs.py -k criterion_contract`.
- [ ] The guide contains the exact project move id, trigger, and coaching template outside the built-in move table. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_docs.py -k coaching_example`.
- [ ] The guide states that discovery changes in Pass 1, existing Pass 2 and Pass 3 remain unchanged, and Pass 4 consumes the project move. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_docs.py -k pass_separation`.
- [ ] Repository lint and type checks pass. Prove with `make lint && make typecheck`.
- [ ] The complete repository test suite passes. Prove with `make test`.
data.title: Document the project portability pattern
